title: MonsterSheet
description: A standalone sheet of one or more materialised monsters. Each monster is a CONCRETE (fixed-stat) catalogued creature emitted as a companion-modifier-shaped stat block, but OWNER-LESS: there is no CORE character and no companions[] linkage. The creature identity is carried on each entry (creature_id) instead of via a CORE.companions[] index. Templated (owner-scaled) creatures cannot appear here — their stats only exist relative to an owner's cast level, so they are rejected at materialisation. Content-neutral: catalog-driven.

monster.description: One materialised standalone monster: the creature it was materialised from, and its resolved stat block. The stat block reuses the SHARED owner-agnostic stat-block base (statBlockBase) — there is no owner to link back to, so it carries no companion_index; the monster's position is its index within monsters[].

creature_id.description: Catalog id of the concrete creature this monster was materialised from.
